boundary_whispers.to_Hollow_Form: The excess fades. Absence calls you home.
boundary_whispers.to_Planar_Witnesses: Your indulgence meets the sharp edge of doubt.
boundary_whispers.to_Mirrorsweat: The gaze turns golden. Performance becomes feast.
boundary_whispers.to_The_Pink_Opaque: Glitter dissolves into dream. The longing remains.

boundary_whispers.to_Cornucopians: Flatness rejects the overflow. Precision cuts through excess.
boundary_whispers.to_Crooked_Datum: The angles refuse to bend. Sacred wrongness meets geometric truth.
boundary_whispers.to_Hollow_Form: Flatness finds its perfect void. Nothing remains angular.
boundary_whispers.to_Signal_Choir: Structure sings in straight lines. Harmony follows form.

boundary_whispers.to_The_Cryptozoo: The gaze dims. Hidden things breathe easier now.
boundary_whispers.to_Hollow_Form: The mirror cracks. Reflection finds its absence.
boundary_whispers.to_Cornucopians: Visibility becomes currency. The feast is performed.
boundary_whispers.to_Sash_Ritual: Individual gaze joins collective rhythm. The procession sees all.

boundary_whispers.to_Planar_Witnesses: Sacred wrongness meets rigid truth. The bend begins.
boundary_whispers.to_Signal_Choir: Harmony warps. The structure sings off-key.
boundary_whispers.to_Cradle_Mold: Wrong angles take root. Growth follows the twisted path.
boundary_whispers.to_The_Cryptozoo: Bent mathematics shelter the unseen. Geometry becomes refuge.

boundary_whispers.to_Cornucopians: Absence swallows excess. The void remembers hunger.
boundary_whispers.to_Mirrorsweat: The gaze finds nothing to reflect. Emptiness performs itself.
boundary_whispers.to_Planar_Witnesses: Void takes geometric shape. Nothing becomes angular.
boundary_whispers.to_The_Pink_Opaque: Absence softens into dream. The void learns to long.
Intuition melts into dream. Logic becomes feeling.
boundary_whispers.to_Cradle_Mold: Felt knowledge takes root. Understanding grows organic.
boundary_whispers.to_The_Blurry_Uninvited: Soft knowing meets hard surveillance. Intuition goes underground.
boundary_whispers.to_Planar_Witnesses: Feeling meets form. The blueprint learns to doubt.

boundary_whispers.to_Signal_Choir: Rhythm becomes harmony. The procession learns to sing.
boundary_whispers.to_Mirrorsweat: Collective gaze focuses. The ritual is performed.
boundary_whispers.to_Hollow_Form: The procession meets emptiness. Rhythm falters in the void.
boundary_whispers.to_The_Blurry_Uninvited: The ceremony is watched. Hidden eyes count the steps.

boundary_whispers.to_Planar_Witnesses: Harmony finds its form. The structure sings true.
boundary_whispers.to_Sash_Ritual: Song becomes procession. Harmony walks the earth.
boundary_whispers.to_Crooked_Datum: Perfect pitch meets sacred discord. The choir learns to bend.
boundary_whispers.to_The_Blurry_Uninvited: Clear signals meet static. The song is jammed.

boundary_whispers.to_Soft_Logic: Growth follows feeling. Decay teaches intuition.
boundary_whispers.to_Crooked_Datum: Life bends toward wrongness. Organic meets sacred twist.
boundary_whispers.to_Mirrorsweat: Growth shuns the gaze. Life happens in the hidden.
boundary_whispers.to_Planar_Witnesses: Organic curves meet flat truth. Nature refuses geometry.

boundary_whispers.to_Hollow_Form: Dream learns emptiness. Longing finds its void.
boundary_whispers.to_Soft_Logic: Feeling becomes knowing. The heart thinks in twilight.
boundary_whispers.to_The_Blurry_Uninvited: Soft beauty meets hard watching. Dreams learn surveillance.
boundary_whispers.to_Sash_Ritual: Private longing meets public ceremony. The dream performs itself.

boundary_whispers.to_Crooked_Datum: Hidden things find bent shelter. Mystery follows twisted paths.
boundary_whispers.to_Cradle_Mold: The unseen takes root. Hidden life grows in shadow.
boundary_whispers.to_Mirrorsweat: Mystery shuns the gaze. The hidden things retreat.
boundary_whispers.to_Signal_Choir: Silence swallows song. The unseen creatures hide from harmony.

boundary_whispers.to_any: The watchers are always watching. Nothing remains unseen.
boundary_whispers.from_any: You have been observed. The data persists.
boundary_whispers.mutual_detection: Recognition protocols activated. Surveillance is bidirectional.

ally_effects.description: Moving between allied Orders feels smooth, whispers are welcoming
ally_effects.ui_effect: Gentle transitions, warm color shifts, harmonious audio crossfades

tension_effects.description: Boundary crossings create narrative friction, exciting conflicts
tension_effects.ui_effect: Sharp transitions, color clash moments, audio discord then resolution

mystery_effects.description: These relationships are undefined, creating space for user discovery
mystery_effects.ui_effect: Glitch moments, uncertain transitions, question-mark whispers

convergence_points.description: Rare locations where multiple Orders overlap
convergence_points.whisper: Here, the Orders blur. Something new wants to be born.

null_zones.description: Spaces claimed by no Order, pure potential
null_zones.whisper: Unclaimed. The myth has not yet arrived.
